title: manilkara butugi
intro: Manilkara butugi, also known as the African star apple, is a tropical tree species native to West Africa, characterized by its star-shaped fruits and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Manilkara butugi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
